===''Pokémon the Series''===
[[File:Maxie anime.png|thumb|left|250px|Maxie in {{aniseries|RS}}]]
====History====
Maxie first appeared in the {{aniseries|RS}} episode ''[[AG097|Gaining Groudon]]''. His goal was to expand the land of [[Hoenn]], believing that if so, the land would be peaceful. After Team Magma captured {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} aboard their mobile sea base, they brought them to Maxie. He explained to the group his goals and how Team Magma was going to accomplish them through {{DL|Kyogre and Groudon (Ruby and Sapphire series)|Groudon}}. In the process, he revealed that Team Magma has possession over a [[Blue Orb]], an item capable of controlling Groudon, as well as {{DL|Kyogre and Groudon (Ruby and Sapphire series)|Kyogre}}. Meanwhile, Shelly, who was working undercover as a {{tc|Team Magma Grunt}}, released Kyogre from its captivity, thus sending it on a rampage that causes Maxie to lose the Blue Orb to {{AP|Pikachu}}, who unwittingly absorbed it. After Team Magma's base was destroyed by Kyogre, Maxie met up with [[Archie]] on [[Monsu Island]] and negotiated a trade: Team Aqua will release two Team Magma Grunts in exchange for the Blue Orb. However, the exchange is interrupted by {{TRT}}'s intrusion of Team Aqua's submarine; Archie accused Team Magma of being behind it, but Maxie denied any involvement.
[[File:Maxie Blue Orb.png|thumb|200px|Maxie and the Blue Orb]]
In ''[[AG098|The Scuffle of Legends]]'', Archie immediately seized control over Kyogre with the [[Red Orb]] in his possession, triggering a battle between Team Magma and Team Aqua. Archie then bonded with the Red Orb, but he was maddened by its effects and announced his intent to engulf the entire island in the ocean, risking the lives of everyone on it, including his own men. Maxie, acting out of seemingly genuine concern, tried to point this out to Archie, but he refused to listen. Later, as Groudon and Kyogre prepared to battle, Maxie listened to [[Lance]]'s speech about how such a conflict posed a threat to the entire world. Eventually, the fight between Kyogre and Groudon was put to an end through the efforts of Ash, his friends, and Lance. Afterwards, Maxie realized the errors of his ways and finally changed his beliefs, now believing that the land of Hoenn is supposed to be kept as is. As a result, Team Magma was eventually disbanded, as revealed in ''[[AG119|The Ribbon Cup Caper]]''.
{{-}}
